description_long: This is a long-handled shovel featuring a straight, cylindrical wooden shaft and a rounded, dark metal blade. The handle is smooth and unadorned, extending seamlessly into the blade with a metal collar for reinforcement. The blade is a classic round-point design, slightly concave, with a gently curved edge ideal for digging. The wood of the handle has a natural finish, while the blade is coated in a dark, likely protective, finish. No visible markings, logos, or mounting hardware are present on the handle or blade. The shovel appears clean and unused, with no signs of wear or damage.
description: A long-handled shovel with a smooth wooden shaft and a dark, rounded metal blade. The design is clean, simple, and free of visible markings or wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight wooden handle and the rounded, dark metal blade facing forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the blade and the cylindrical shape of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the back of the blade and handle visible, showing no additional features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the blade's thin edge and the handle's round profile.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical wooden handle, smooth, natural finish, no grip or ergonomic features.
attribute_blade_type: Round-point blade, slightly concave, dark finish, gently curved edge.
